title: Decide task ranking and generated artifact tracking policy
description: Resolve the lower-priority workflow recommendations after correctness is stable. Decide whether equal-priority strategy needs an optional explicit rank and whether generated reports/views should be tracked, optional, or ignored by default. Record deliberate decisions before adding schema or repository-policy surface area.
acceptance: A decision record evaluates priority-plus-id, priority-plus-created_at, and optional rank ordering with migration and UI implications.
If rank is accepted, TaskRecord adds an optional nonnegative rank and selection orders by priority, rank, creation time, then id with deterministic tests and surface support.
A decision record distinguishes canonical JSON from disposable index and generated Markdown and defines the default tracking/regeneration policy.
If generated views become optional, sync/report behavior, documentation, ignore rules, and freshness validation agree.
The decision explicitly records why no deferred status is added unless todo-as-backlog proves insufficient after the readiness correction.
notes: This is deliberately gated behind lifecycle and sync correctness. Do not add rank, deferred, or new configuration merely to close the feedback item; record a wont_do/deferred decision when evidence does not justify the complexity.
